| `pair_g1_aiming1_subject1.npz` | Generated by `scripts/make_pairs_lafan1.py` from LAFAN1 `aiming1_subject1.bvh` + GMR teacher @ `bb1bbe40` | **LAFAN1-derived — NOT published** (gitignored; Ubisoft La Forge terms unverified for redistribution).
